import React from 'react'; import { Company } from '@aura-sync/shared'; interface DashboardLayoutProps { companies: Company[]; children: React.ReactNode; } const DashboardLayout: React.FC = ({ companies, children }) => { return (

Aura Sync

Control Center

Escaneamento incremental ativado por padrão.

Conectado

Painel Multi-Tenant

Visão 360° dos backups em tempo real.

Admin

Felipe

Empresas
{companies.length}
Máquinas
{companies.reduce((acc, c) => acc + c.machines.length, 0)}
Status
Seguro
{children}
); }; export default DashboardLayout;
